title: arctotis leichtliniana
intro: Arctotis leichtliniana, also known as the Leichtlin's African Daisy or Cape marigold, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Arctotis leichtliniana include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce inflammation, and protect against infections. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as in topical applications like creams and ointments.
